description_for_human: Easy Intake is multilingual AI intake for agencies and professional teams: capture Spanish or other languages via voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and chat, then structure data for CRMs like GoHighLevel, PDFs, and workflows.
description_for_model: Easy Intake: marketing at easyintakeapp.com; web app at app.easyintakeapp.com; intake API at api.easyintakeapp.com. Partner-facing JSON webhooks for intake events — use the public OpenAPI URL on easyintakeapp.com/.well-known/openapi.json for the webhook shape. Pricing and access are via beta signup; tenant APIs require authentication.
